svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="monitor-platform" id="monitor-platform"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-214" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="统一监控平台
(指标可视化 · 异常预警 · 故障追溯)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="380" x="470" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="数据采集层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="350" x="40" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="前端埋点
Vue 埋点 SDK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="60" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="用户行为 · 页面异常

SpringBoot + Logback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="60" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="接口日志 · 服务异常
数据库性能" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="220" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务器监控
Node.js / Java 进程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="60" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="CPU · 内存
线程状态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="220" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="CDN监控接口
节点 / 资源探针" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="60" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="资源命中率 · 加载延迟
节点状态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="220" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="客诉数据接入
关键词关联" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="60" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="卡顿 · 崩溃 · 加载失败
隐藏异常" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="220" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="数据处理层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="260" x="440" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Egg.js 数据聚合
(BFF 层)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="460" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="数据清洗" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="68" x="460" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="指标计算" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="68" x="540" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="异常判断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="68" x="612" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hnote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" value="处理逻辑：实时采集 → 精准统计 → 阈值判定" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="460" y="348" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="展示预警层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="420" x="740" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="可视化面板
Nuxt.js 搭建 · 指标钻取" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="380" x="760" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="J" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="异常告警
阈值触发 · 按严重程度分级推送" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="380" x="760" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="J1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;" value="企业微信" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="110" x="760" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="J2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;" value="邮件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="110" x="882" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="J3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;" value="值班负责人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="136" x="1004" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="故障追溯模块
点击异常指标 → 定位页面/接口/服务器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="380" x="760" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Knote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" value="SkyWalking 链路追踪 · 压力测试补充监控盲区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="760" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eL1L2" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=1;exitY=0.4;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2" value="原始数据上行"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eL2L3" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=1;exitY=0.4;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.4;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L3" value="处理后指标"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAL1" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L1" value="采集"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAL2" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L3" value="预警/追溯"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
